eval_cases.cv_text:
Name: Jane Doe
Role: Senior Backend Engineer
Experience: 5 years at TechCorp.
Skills: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes, GCP.
Achievements:
- Designed and built a real-time event streaming pipeline using Python and Redis Pub/Sub, processing 10k events/sec.
- Re-architected PostgreSQL database schema, reducing query latencies by 40%.
- Led migration of 15 microservices to Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE).
eval_cases.doc_text:
Project: EventStreamingPipeline
Overview: A real-time data ingestion and processing system.
Architecture: Python FastAPI services receive HTTP payloads, validate them, and push them to Redis. A worker daemon consumes messages from Redis, aggregates metrics, and batches writes to PostgreSQL.
Key Decisions:
- Used Redis Pub/Sub for lightweight, sub-millisecond event dispatching.
- Configured connection pool size of 20 for PostgreSQL to handle high concurrent database writes.
- Implemented horizontal pod autoscaling (HPA) in Kubernetes based on CPU utilization to handle traffic spikes.
